parameters.content:
## This Flow is to convert JSON to JSON, EXCEL, TEXT FILE, HTML Files

Manual Trigger --> Sample JSON File ( Customer Details ) --> Convert JSON to EXCEL, TEXT, CSV & HTML Files --> we can download the data here if required --> Extract From Files ( TEXT, CSV, HTML, Excel )

Note: since Customer Details in JSON file is wrapped in parent node as array , while converting this to Excel of Text or CSV will result in same line appending same fields in single line for ex :

Row 1 --> Customer[0].CustomerID & remaining fields, Customer[1].CustomerID & remaining fields, Customer[1].CustomerID & remaining fields, 
 it will result all customer details will be placed in Single link instead of multiple lines.

Note: **No second row will be created**

to avoid this, there is Function written under **Code** node, as below 
_**return $json.customers.map(c => ({ json: c }));**_
which will convert every array value as seperate lines and will result good in excel. 
Ex:
Row 1 --> Customer[0].CustomerID
Row 2 --> Customer[0].CustomerID
Row 3 --> Customer[0].CustomerID
